title: Protein Transfer using Bio-rad TransBlot Turbo
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3s7ks","text":"A protocol for transfer of proteins from acrylamide gels onto nitrocellulose membrane for immunoblot analysis. This protocol is based on the assumption that TGX pre-cast gels have been used, the procedure is very similar for self-made gels, just that the running time is longer. Using the transfer packs is economically similar to wet-transfer using MeOH.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"akb94","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6bldi","text":"Note:  Clean the apparatus immediately after use with dH2O and dry. This prevents the build-up of salts and rust which impair performance. materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"e7f8p","text":"TransBlotR-TurboTM Transfer System (Bio-Rad Laboratories; 1704150)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":9,"length":1},{"style":"sup","offset":16,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":58,"length":7}],"data":[]},{"key":"2ggdv","text":"Trans-Blot Turbo Mini 0.2 µm Nitrocellulose Transfer Packs (Bio-Rad Laboratories;1704158)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":81,"length":7}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"3F86C00238EC11EBA61A0A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://www.bio-rad.com/en-us/sku/1704150-trans-blot-turbo-transfer-system?ID=1704150"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"3F86C0A838EC11EBA61A0A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://www.bio-rad.com/en-us/sku/1704158-trans-blot-turbo-mini-0-2-um-nitrocellulose-transfer-packs?ID=1704158"}}}}
steps: Place the membrane and bottom stack in the middle of the cassette base
Place the pre-cast gel (following SDS-PAGE electrophoresis) in the middle of the membrane and roll to remove air-bubbles
Place the top stack on top of the gel, gently roll
Close the cassette lid, taking care not to disturb the gel

Place the cassette in the Trans-Blot Turbo and follow the instructions on the machine (Fast protocol TGX gel). Trans-Blot® Turbo™ (Protein transfer apparatus, Bio-rad Laboratories, 1704150EDU, https://www.bio-rad.com/en-us/product/trans-blot-turbo-transfer-system?ID=M7FAXO15 )
Either dry membrane and store at 4 °C for later use or proceed immediately to fluorescent western protocol
creator: Steven J Burgess
